summary: bin/rails test (RAILS_ENV=test, PARALLEL_WORKERS=1 to avoid a fork-related hang in this sandboxed environment) executes 238 runs / 786 assertions with 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skips, including the new/updated tests for this iteration's implementer changes (test/services/phases/pause_test.rb and test/services/phases/restart_define_test.rb, which grew to cover pause/restart interaction). bin/rubocop (rubocop-rails-omakase) inspected 151 files with no offenses. db:test:prepare loaded the schema (including the 20260718230012_add_pause_support_to_phases migration) with no errors. Only Ruby/Rails files changed in this build phase (controllers, helpers, models, queries, services, views for the human-in-the-loop pause/menu-loop feature); no worker (Node/TS) code was touched, so no additional test runner applies.
